top_signals.title: Macron and Modi turn on personal charm offensives as France and India race to secure AI investment
top_signals.summary: Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low
top_signals.summary: Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan said the bottom is “closer than ever,” while a Swan Bitcoin analyst suggested investors buy now at a discount rather than overpaying later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
